title: serruria zanthophylla
intro: Serruria zanthophylla, also known as King's lily or Cape kings lily, is a flowering plant native to the Cape Provinces of South Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Serruria zanthophylla include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve respiratory issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Serruria zanthophylla include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
